uk: 🕃 Святої мироносиці й рівноапостольної Марії Магдалини
saints.en: St. Myrrh-Bearer and Equal-to-the-Apostles Mary Magdalene. Return of the Relics of Hieromartyr Phocas

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 рівноап; 3 свщмч., Сл.: рівноап., І нині: богород. за гласом «Слава». Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар рівноап., Сл.: свщмч., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар рівноап. (2), Сл.: свщмч., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом «Слава». Катизми чергові, сідальні Октоїха. Канон Октоїха, рівноап. і свщмч. По 9-ій пісні – світильний Октоїха і рівноап., Сл.: світил. свщмч., І нині: богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар рівноап., Сл.: свщмч., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря рівноап. і за днем тижня.
Часи: на 1-му – тропар дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му – рівноап., на 9-му – свщмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 154 зач.; 13, 4 – 14, 5. Єв. – Мт. 80 зач.; 20, 1-16.

troparion_en.text:
(Podoben: “Your tomb, O Savior...”)
You followed Christ Who was born of a virgin for our sake, O revered Mary Magdalene,  / keeping His commandments and laws. /  Today, as we celebrate your most holy memory, we rejoice in faith, /  and by your prayers, we receive the forgiveness of our sins.

kontakion_en.text:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up...”)
When God, transcendent in His nature, came into the world in the flesh, O Mary,  / He received you as His true disciple as was meet.  / For you had all your desire and your love set upon Him;  / therefore, you provided many cures for the sick;  / and now, translated into the Heavens, you always pray for the world.

matched_oca_saint: Myrrhbearer and Equal of the Apostles Mary Magdalene

oca_saints.name: Myrrhbearer and Equal of the Apostles Mary Magdalene

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Your tomb, O Savior...”)
You followed Christ Who was born of a virgin for our sake, O revered Mary Magdalene,  / keeping His commandments and laws. /  Today, as we celebrate your most holy memory, we rejoice in faith, /  and by your prayers, we receive the forgiveness of our sins.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up...”)
When God, transcendent in His nature, came into the world in the flesh, O Mary,  / He received you as His true disciple as was meet.  / For you had all your desire and your love set upon Him;  / therefore, you provided many cures for the sick;  / and now, translated into the Heavens, you always pray for the world.

oca_saints.name: Translation of the relics of the Hieromartyr Phocas, Bishop of Sinope

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation,  / O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith,  / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Phocas entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion.text: The Master established you as a brilliant sun / shining on all the faithful, glorious hieromartyr Phocas. / He has accepted your life, faith and contest as myrrh, / for He is rich in mercy.

oca_saints.name: Repose of Venerable Cornelius of Pereyaslavl

troparion.text: Let us honor the new God-pleaser, Venerable Cornelius,  / who lifted the cross upon his shoulders, eagerly taking up the yoke of Christ, /  he fought courageously against invisible enemies and intrigues, / and as a good soldier he stands before the Master Christ and prays without ceasing for our souls.

Your lamb Markella calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice:  /  “I love You, my Bridegroom, and in seeking You I endure suffering.  /  In Baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You,  /  and I died so that I might live with You.  /  Accept me as a pure sacrifice,  /  for I have offered myself in love.”  /  Through her prayers, save our souls, since You are merciful.
